theme: Should Animals Be Kept in Zoos?

sentences.english: Should animals be kept in zoos?
For some, zoos are a good way to teach people about nature and save endangered species from extinction.
sentences.korean: 일부에게 동물원은 자연을 가르치고 멸종위기종을 구하는 좋은 방법이에요.

sentences.english: Others think separating animals from their natural habitat is cruel and unnecessary.
sentences.korean: 다른 이들은 동물을 자연 서식지에서 분리하는 것이 잔인하고 불필요하다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: With an estimated 700 million visitors every year, zoos remain popular.
sentences.korean: 연간 약 7억 명의 방문객으로 동물원은 여전히 인기 있어요.
